## Summary

Describe the business capability and why it is needed.

## Module gate

- [ ] Requirements and acceptance scenarios are documented.
- [ ] Permissions and audit behavior are covered.
- [ ] Tests were written or updated and pass locally.
- [ ] Release build and formatting verification pass.
- [ ] Database migrations and operational impact are documented.
- [ ] User and administrator documentation are updated.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or production data are included.

## Verification

List the exact commands and manual scenarios used.

## Deployment and rollback

Describe migrations, configuration changes, backup requirements, and rollback steps.
